testcase.name: test_login_with_incorrect_credentials

error.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"css selector","selector":"*[name='email']"} (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.116) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.15.0', revision: '1d14b5521b' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [d267a867c1645cd3ff43b37014ecc550, findElement {using=name, value=email}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.116, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.117 (474cc805edd..., userDataDir: C:\Users\PC\AppData\Local\T...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52143}, goog:processID: 3252, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52143/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.116, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: d267a867c1645cd3ff43b37014ecc550

testcase.system-err: Apr 25, 2026 1:51:43 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 25, 2026 1:51:43 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.116. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
